description_long: This object is a stylized biplane with a streamlined fuselage and two sets of straight, parallel wings stacked vertically. The wings and tailplane feature rounded tips with a contrasting color at the ends, while the main body is smooth and tapers toward the rear. The nose houses a circular engine cowling, and a simple propeller is visible at the front. The cockpit is open and centrally located between the upper and lower wings, with no visible canopy. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both with rounded edges and matching color accents.
description: A stylized biplane with stacked wings, rounded wingtips, an open cockpit, and a streamlined fuselage with color accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular engine cowling, open cockpit, and the stacked biplane wings with rounded tips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, open cockpit, and the propeller at the nose.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer, as well as the stacked wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the propeller, wing struts, and the rounded tail with color accents.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a small tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located forward of the wing center, mid-fuselage.
